rules.policy: normalize smart and straight apostrophes into canonical display titles while filenames use underscore-safe ascii slugs
use single canonical display hyphenation; filenames remain lowercase snake_case
retain only one canonical filename per object; aliases belong in alias_registry only
district, row, harbor, exchange, and outpost suffixes must reflect the object type explicitly
road, lane, and corridor terms must match the route object type and not drift between duplicate browse files
settlement objects and route objects may share stems but must not share identical normalized names
